channel.title: Somerset County Probate Court
channel.description: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. Purely descriptive/static page (mission statement, services, contact); low expected change frequency.

item.title: Page updated: Somerset County Probate Court
item.description:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Removed: - Ph: 207-474-9861 - Open Hours: Mon - Fri 8:00 am - 4:00 pm - Home - Government - Communities - Documents - Agendas - RFP’s and Open Bids - Minutes - Other - Employment - Employment Application - Notify Me - County Charter - Services - Cooperative Extension - Skowhegan Outdoors - Soil & Water Conservation District - Economic Development Corporation - Departments - Administration - Budget Committee - Communications - County Commissioners - District Attorney’s Office - Emergency Management - Finance Department - Human Resources - Information Technology - Maintenance - Probate Office - Registry of Deeds - Sheriff’s Office & Jail - Unorganized Territories - Press Resources - Report an Issue - Probate Office - Home - Probate Office - All Departments - Administration - Budget Committee - Communications - County Commissioners - District Attorney's Office - Emergency Management - Finance Department - Human Resources - Information Technology - Maintenance - Probate Office - Registry of Deeds - Unorganized Territories - Somerset County - Probate Office - Our Purpose: - The Somerset County Probate Office oversees a spectrum of critical matters, including estates of deceased and missing persons, guardianship of both adults and minors, conservatorships, trusts, legal name changes, adoptions, and other vital family affairs. We understand the significance of these proc [diff truncated]

We understand the significance of these proc [diff truncated]
